hero.title: Aḥezzeb
hero.lead: IATF yebɣa ad yeǧǧ asmel-a ad yili d awezlan, ad yettwaɣ, ad d-yettwaḍer s tastawt, yerna ad yili yeddukel d tutlayin i d-iɛawnen.
support: I useqdec n web, IATF [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/) D ayen i d-yettakken azal i useqdec n teknulujiyin n tallalt.

paragraphs: Ma tufiḍ aɣilif deg usmel-a, di leɛnaya-k ini-t-id s yimayl:
items: d acu-t tteknulujit n tallalt, iminig neɣ asnas i tesqedceḍ, ma yella d ayen ilaqen
d acu ara d-yefken afus n tallelt
report.footnote: Ur teḥwaǧeḍ ara ad d-taruḍ kra n warraw n yiɣil.

paragraphs: Tiɣawsiwin n tuqqna zemrent ad ttwaseklesent deg usebter aɣelnaw yemsefhamen akken ad zemren ad ttwaḥerzen di tlelli.
Ma yella deg ungal-ik yella wayen yellan d aselkim, ini-t-id swaswa deg izen-nni.
Asmel-a d amecṭuḥ s lebɣi-s yerna d win ur nettbeddil ara.
